prompt:
Requested test types: Functional / E2E, UI Testing
User flow (design source of truth ŌĆö 2 screens). Each screen has a design image (attached, model can see it); the LIVE app is validated AGAINST each screen's design as you navigate. NONE of these images is the live app.
  1. Screen "Home" ŌĆö reached by: Start page ŌĆö open the application URL. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-01.png
  2. Screen "Screen 2" ŌĆö reached by: click "learn more" link. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-19.png
Generate ONE Playwright flow that opens the start page, validates it against screen 1, then performs each navigation action and validates the resulting page against that screen's design. Deviations are defects. Do not pre-declare deviations before running.
Task: Test the homepage against the attached design.
output:
